title: feishu_bitable_publish_form
description: Input for phase 2 (publish/share) of converting a Feishu bitable into a questionnaire. Only call this AFTER a human has reviewed the draft questions returned by feishu_bitable_draft_form. The draft_session_id from phase 1's response is required and must match the same bitable_url and auth profile.

query.description: Natural-language instruction. Should contain the same Feishu bitable URL used in phase 1.
examples: 请把这个飞书多维表格转成问卷：https://lexmount.feishu.cn/wiki/DrETwmLEmiHUZ9kDkAsctla5nkK

draft_session_id.description: Token returned by feishu_bitable_draft_form's response (`draft_session_id`). Single-use; expires after DRAFT_SESSION_TTL_SEC (default 1800s). The server rejects mismatched bitable_url or auth profile.

bitable_url.description: Optional explicit Feishu bitable URL. When omitted, the server extracts it from `query`. Must match the URL used in the draft phase.

human_confirmation_notes.description: Optional human review feedback. The agent will apply these edit instructions before opening 分享表单 / 开启表单分享.

headless.description: Whether to run the browser in headless mode.

profile_id.description: Server-side stored auth profile id. If omitted, the service falls back to FEISHU_DEFAULT_PROFILE_ID.

storage_state.description: Playwright storage state JSON object for an already logged-in Feishu session.

storage_state_path.description: Path to an existing Feishu storage state file inside the container.

sensitive_data.description: Optional Browser Use sensitive_data payload for login assistance.
